race.comment: CONFLICT (15) also ran well in all runs in the debut prep and has jumped out well. Was also an acceptor in a winnable race at Kyneton on Friday, so if they run here it's a good push for his chances. YULE POINT (9) returned last time with a solid second at Wangaratta over 1170m. He'll have come on from that and with the majority of the field either first-up or on debut, the run under the belt could prove crucial. I'M DA BOSS (1) is on debut, but swept home from last to win his latest jumpout which could be good training for this given the wide draw. TAGAMATE (8) returns for the Kavanaghs and looks best of the rest off two sound jumpouts.
